step2.label: STEP 2

step2.desc: Your beautifully designed digital menu opens instantly on their device

pricing.subtitle: One all-in-one plan with everything you need to run and grow your restaurant.
features: Mobile app for taking orders on the go
Connect an unlimited number of workstations
Automatic updates to the latest versions

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: €50 per month (before VAT), with no installation fee. Your first month is completely free and no credit card is required to get started.

items.question: Is there really a free trial?
items.answer: Yes — your first month is on us, so you can test everything risk-free. No card required, and you can cancel anytime.

items.question: Do you offer a discount for longer commitments?
items.answer: Yes. Sign a 2-year contract and you'll get 15% off your monthly price.

items.question: Do my customers need to download an app?
items.answer: No. Guests scan the QR code on their table and browse, order, and pay straight from their phone's browser — no app required.

items.question: How many devices or workstations can I connect?
items.answer: As many as you need. Connect an unlimited number of workstations at no extra cost.

items.question: Is my data safe and backed up?
items.answer: Yes. Your database is automatically backed up and stored in the cloud, so your menu, orders, and statistics are always protected.

items.question: Do you help with setup, training, and support?
items.answer: Absolutely. You get staff training, guidance for setting up your product catalog, 24/7 support, and automatic updates to the latest version.

items.question: Can I manage my restaurant remotely?
items.answer: Yes. With remote access and our mobile apps you can monitor sales and statistics — and even take orders — from your phone, wherever you are.
